name: Hash Brown Crunch Wrap
servings: serves 4 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 20 minutes

ingredients.item: strips of thick-cut bacon, cooked and crumbled

method: Cook hash brown patties until crisp, based on package instructions.
Add eggs, milk, salt, and pepper to a bowl. Mix well until combined. Then, pour onto a skillet and cook until scrambled. Set aside.
Heat two different-sized (one smaller than the other) heavy-bottomed pans over medium heat.
Once heated, place tortillas into the bigger pan and, in even amounts, add cheese, a hash brown patty, eggs, bacon, avocado, and tomatoes in the center of the tortilla in that order.
Using a wheel pattern, fold the tortilla around the filling with the edge facing up. Place heated smaller pan (such as a cast-iron skillet) on top for about 20 seconds or until browned.
